title: Olivia Dean Stars at Big Music Festival
summary: Olivia Dean is a famous singer who will be the main act on the last day of a big music festival called Radio 1's Big Weekend. The festival happens in Sunderland at Herrington Country Park from May 22 to 24. On Sunday, Olivia Dean will perform with other singers like Niall Horan and Kehlani. On Saturday, singers like Zara Larsson and Louis Tomlinson will play, and on Friday, DJs Fatboy Slim and Sonny Fodera will start the festival. Olivia Dean recently won many awards, including at the Brits and a Grammy, making her very popular. This is her first time headlining a big UK show. Other artists like CMAT and Myles Smith will also sing on Sunday, and there are more performers on different stages. The festival is a fun event with lots of music for everyone to enjoy.

background_read: Radio 1's Big Weekend is a yearly music festival organized by BBC Radio 1, where popular singers and bands perform for free or low cost. It moves to different cities in the UK each year to bring music to many people. Olivia Dean is a young singer from London known for her soulful songs and recent award wins, making her a rising star in the music world.
Article_Structure: WHO: Olivia Dean, Niall Horan, Kehlani, Zara Larsson, Louis Tomlinson, Fatboy Slim, Sonny Fodera, and other artists
WHAT: A music festival with performances over three days
WHERE: Herrington Country Park in Sunderland, UK
WHY: To celebrate music and entertain people with live performances

perspectives.description: Excited to see popular artists perform live at a big festival
